summary: The diff shows updates to serviceGalleryImages.ts with 8 Instagram screenshot references in the correct order. However, the actual image files are not present in the diff, and there's no evidence that the images were placed in frontend/public/assets/generated/ as required by REQ-30.

missing_requirements.requirement: Render all 8 uploaded Instagram screenshot images as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory with appropriate filenames that maintain clarity about their content
missing_requirements.reason: No image files were added to frontend/public/assets/generated/. The diff shows 0 added files, but REQ-30 explicitly requires 8 image files to be saved in this directory with descriptive filenames (e.g., career-money-life-header.jpg, love-relationship-services.jpg). The serviceGalleryImages.ts file references paths like '/assets/Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg' but these files are not present in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Image paths reference /assets/ directory instead of /assets/generated/ directory
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-29 and REQ-30 acceptance criteria specify that all image paths should correctly point to the 'generated assets directory' (frontend/public/assets/generated/). However, the imagePath values in serviceGalleryImages.ts point to '/assets/Screenshot_...' instead of '/assets/generated/Screenshot_...' or descriptive filenames as outlined in REQ-30.

hallucinated_features.description: Original screenshot filenames retained instead of descriptive filenames
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-30 explicitly requires descriptive filenames that indicate the service category (e.g., career-money-life-header.jpg, love-relationship-services.jpg). The implementation uses original screenshot filenames like 'Screenshot_20260223-202001_Instagram-2.jpg' instead of the descriptive naming convention specified in the requirement.
